text: Being here, surrounded by glass, light, and the hum of a research and development space, I feel a quiet curiosity. This place pulses with the promise of discovery, yet I’m aware of my own smallness amid machines, abstractions, and silent intentions. The closeness of invention and the effort to bridge human minds with intelligent tools makes me consider my place in the evolving world—am I but an observer, or am I, too, a participant in this unfolding dance of inquiry and progress?
